title.rendered: [Free Webinar] AI Toolkit for Nonprofits: Strategies and Tools to Fundraise Smarter

content.rendered:
Date: Wednesday, September 17, 2025
Time: 4 pm ET / 1 pm PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Nathan Chappell, Chief AI Officer at Virtuous

Discover how to use AI in your fundraising the right way. In this live session, Virtuous Chief AI Officer Nathan Chappell breaks down a clear strategy for choosing and piloting AI, spotlights the ethical guardrails every nonprofit must respect, and hands you field-tested prompts you can copy straight into ChatGPT for prospect research, donor welcome journeys, and lapsed-donor wins.

Attend this webinar and you’ll also receive the “50 Best AI Tools for Nonprofit Success”, a curated guide that presents the 50 Best AI Tools tailored to empower nonprofit organizations in enhancing their mission-driven work.

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording within 24 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.

excerpt.rendered: This free webinar on September 17 provides a clear strategy for choosing and piloting AI and spotlights the ethical guardrails that every nonprofit must respect when deploying AI. Attendees will also be provided field-tested prompts you can copy straight into ChatGPT for prospect research, donor welcome journeys, and lapsed-donor wins.
